dailyWords.word: よろしくお願いします
dailyWords.meaning: Nice to meet you / Please treat me well
dailyWords.example: はじめまして。よろしくお願いします。

tips.title: How to register your address in Japan
tips.description: Visit your city office within 14 days and bring your residence card, passport, and a completed moving-in notice.

tips.title: Using public transport
tips.description: Pay with IC cards like Suica or Pasmo and ask for assistance at ticket offices when needed.

tips.title: Buy a SIM card
tips.description: Choose a prepaid plan for short stays or a contract plan for longer stays with coverage from major carriers.
